projectDescription: A Next.js template for deploying your own website proxy on Vercel, enabling you to mirror any target website through a custom domain.
keyFeatures: One-click Vercel deployment via GitHub fork
publicApiSurface: api/proxy.js — Vercel serverless function that proxies all requests to the target URL
vercel.json rewrites — routes all incoming paths to /api/proxy
createProxyMiddleware({ target, changeOrigin, pathRewrite }) — core proxy configuration
target variable — the website URL to proxy (default: https://www.google.com/)
